description: CompositionGreen kurta made of 100% cotton, with a round pierrot neck in hakoba lace, and has short sleevesFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed green kurta from w!
